creator: muir@idiom.com
text:
The ipfw man page says:

      Much more examples can be found in files:
	     /usr/share/misc/ipfw.samp.filters
	     /usr/share/misc/ipfw.samp.scripts

However the files aren't there.  They are:

	/usr/src/share/misc/ipfw.samp.filters
	/usr/src/share/misc/ipfw.samp.scripts

Perhaps they just need to be installed, but it isn't reasonable
to expect everyone to do a make install in the right place before
reading the man page...
